programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a deep dive into some deep-fried dishes that are sure to satisfy the craving for crunch. These creations have crunchy coatings so crispy that you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Tastes of Texas
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson discovers the best food that Texas has to offer. Whether it's state legends like chili and barbecue, or flavors from south of the border, it's time to fill your plate in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: As Good as Mom's
programme.desc: Wolfgang Puck, Curtis Stone and Andrew Zimmern talk about dishes that remind them of Mom.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Orleans
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the Big Easy where the food and the culture are a mix of southern tradition and modern influence.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Northern California
programme.desc: Andrew visits Northern California where people are re-inventing they way they look at food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Zagreb
programme.desc: Andrew dives in to the fairytale-like city of Zagreb, Croatia. The city's cuisine has a meat-centric menu and celebrates iconic dishes like porky kotlovina, tender veal cheeks and savory stuffed peppers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Bronx
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the international flavors of one of America's most diverse communities, the Bronx, New York. He finds Italian-influenced bites like dry-aged pork sausage, spicy Jamaican meat pastries and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hurl, Interrupted/ Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret./ After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Parent Just Don’t Understand
programme.desc: Evan is forced to return to his parents’ house to secure Trolls Passage on the group’s journey, but it won’t be easy since he already burned that bridge.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Fancy/ Krabby Road
programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward redecorate his house. / Plankton forms a rock band with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward
programme.desc: Squidward has a surgery to fix his face after SpongeBob slams a door on him accidentally. However, the surgery makes him amazingly beautiful.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfish Hunter/ The Fry Cook Games
programme.desc: Customers love SpongeBob's jellyfish Krabby Patty. The fast food Olympics take place.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob The Director
programme.desc: SpongeBob directs the frozen Krabby Patty commercials.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Kraang Conspiracy
programme.desc: Feeling left out of the action, April insists on joining the Turtles on a mission to TCRI, where they learn a shocking secret about April's past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Good, the Bad and Casey Jones
programme.desc: After encountering mutants and ninjas, Casey Jones decides to take on 'pure evil' alone. When he meets Raphael, the two hot-headed fighters must put their dislike for each other aside and work together against a common foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Fungus Humungous
programme.desc: A fungus mutant spreading through the sewers causes the Turtles and April to experience their worst fears as Leonardo must face his greatest fear-losing his team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead Rewired
programme.desc: When Donnie upgrades Metalhead's artificial intelligence, he must decide if he can trust a sentient Metalhead or if he has created a new foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Of Rats and Men
programme.desc: When the Rat King returns, Splinter must overcome his guilt and fear of the Rat King controlling his mind in order to defeat his foe once and for all.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Manhattan Project
programme.desc: Facing Shredder's deadly new assassin, Leo must decide whether to risk his brother's lives or ask for Splinter's help. Donnie must put aside his rivalry with Casey in order to uncover a new Kraang plot.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Sporix Unleashed
programme.desc: Ollie carries out a plan to catch Sporix without his teammates’ knowledge. When monsters take advantage of his idea, Ollie realizes the benefit of working as a team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po teams up with kung-fu masters to take down an old enemy who has a new, deadly weapon.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Street Smart
programme.desc: Yasmine's celebrity client DJ Khaled visits, presenting Dylan with a golden opportunity to prove his rap credentials and score a record deal.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Chasing That Dream
programme.desc: Dylan has trouble adjusting to the Wilson family's rules, leading to confrontation with his uncle that makes him feel unwanted.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Birthday
programme.desc: While trying to celebrate his birthday, Henry keeps getting interrupted by crimes going on in Swellview.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Grand Theft Otto
programme.desc: Piper's school parrot Otto starts repeating 'Henry is Kid Danger'.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Love Bytes
programme.desc: Things get a little buggy when Schwoz installs a new operating system on the Man Cave Computer designed to detect and eliminate threats all over Swellview.

programme.title: Drama Club: Slumber Games
programme.desc: The Drama Club participates in an all school game of capture the flag in order to earn some respect, but when Bench says he is going to play for the football team instead, they are worried about their chances.

programme.title: Henry Danger: My Dinner With Big Foot
programme.desc: The kids befriend Bigfoot, so Kid Danger and Captain Man must get rid of a hunter trying to capture him.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Broken Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Kid Danger publicly breaks his arm, and Henry and the gang have to keep his secret safe.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Holey Moley
programme.desc: The gang thinks they have found the perfect tunnels to access all of Swellview, until they are confronted by the tunnels' original inhabitants.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Greater Hater
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia's world is turned upside down with the arrival of a new villain that threatens Lord Hater's status as the Greatest in the Galaxy.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Big Day/ The Breakfast
programme.desc: Lord Hater finally captures Wander and Sylvia, but before Wander meets his doom, he convinces Hater convinces Hater to plan a special event for the occasion. Wander and Hater each struggle in their own way when making breakfast.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Fremergency Fronfract / The Boy Wander
programme.desc: When Wander picks up a loopy Lord Hater from the dentist, he spends the day showing Hater how much fun being good can be. Then, Wander heroically faces a ridiculous villain from his past who no one takes seriously.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Wanders/ The Axe
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia go from planet to planet helping people live free and have fun.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Loose Screw/ The It
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia must choose to either help an old woman or prevent an invasion. Lord Hater attempts to ignore Wander so he can climb the villain leaderboard.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Cool Guy/ The Catastrophe
programme.desc: Lord Hater ditches Peepers to party with Emperor Awesome. Then, Sylvia discovers Wander's new obsession with funny cat videos is part of a more fiendish viral plot.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Persistence! Kolossal Strike!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Listen To Your Bey's Voice!
Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous!
programme.desc: Darkwing gains an unlikely sidekick as he uncovers a dark conspiracy tied to the Missing Mysteries and one of Scrooge's employees.

programme.title: G.O.A.T.s: The Beginnings

programme.desc: Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bath houses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Fatbeard
programme.desc: Cartman's dream of living the life of a pirate will come true if he can just get to Somalia. When he doesn't find a crew of swashbucklers, he assumes command and leads the Somalian pirates to a glory of riches.

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...
programme.desc: While the country celebrates the outcome of the election, the new President-elect catches everyone off guard when he arrives at the White House prematurely.

programme.title: South Park: The Hobbit
programme.desc: When Wendy tries to fix one of her girl friends up with Butters, she ends up in the counsellor’s office.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn
programme.desc: With South Park's senior citizens behind the wheel, more than a few farmer's markets have been mowed down. Unwilling to surrender their driver's licenses, the elderly fight back.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime against Token and lands in juvenile hall.

programme.title: South Park: Cancelled
programme.desc: Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny find out that planet Earth is just one big intergalactic reality show and it's about to be cancelled.

programme.title: Movie: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: A college freshman at Duke University decides to become a porn star to pay her tuition. When another student outs her, she is sent down a road of slut shaming, death threats, cyberbullying, and national media attention.

programme.desc: A newly engaged woman begins to suspect her husband's ex isn't gone for good.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Lupus, Foster Care & Hair Growth

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Beautiful Doom
programme.desc: Meredith and Christina continue to try to come to terms with the plane crash and their new responsibilities. Meredith struggles with taking care of Zola after a case hits close to home and Christina does a complicated surgery.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Second Opinion
programme.desc: As the doctors continue with their lawsuit, they're forced to confront the realities of their injuries. Meanwhile, Bailey tricks Arizona into helping her with a pediatric case, and Cristina tries to find normalcy in her new environment.

programme.title: The Closer: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Captain Raydor accompanies Brenda on an investigation involving the disappearance of a nanny working for close friends of the mayor. They discover that what they may have on their hands is a serial rapist armed with a stun gun.

programme.title: The Closer: In Custody
programme.desc: While investigating a suspicious suicide, the squad wades into a nasty child-custody dispute between a dying man and his meth-addicted ex-wife. Meanwhile, Pope applies for the police chief job.

programme.title: Major Crimes: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Provenza faces possible permanent desk duty while the squad investigates the suspicious death of a loathsome ICE agent, which brings them into contact with the residents of an ancient apartment complex nicknamed La Shangri-la.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Backfire
programme.desc: A 19-year-old prostitute is brutally murdered. The squad rushes to reach a deal with the remorseless killer they believe is part of a larger criminal enterprise. Their efforts, however, do not sit well with the judge assigned to the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Poster Boy
programme.desc: The team works strategically to capture a spree killer who has put everyone on high alert. Trying to solve the case quickly, Raydor is torn between two seemingly right decisions, each of which comes with major consequences.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: After a bad batch of drugs claims the lives of two brothers, the race is on for the squad to find the dealer before more of their fellow high school students are threatened. Meanwhile, Rusty is feeling smothered by his new security detail.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jailbait
programme.desc: When a newly released prisoner misses two back-to-back parole meetings, the squad is called in to track him down. Meanwhile, Sharon invites a therapist to the office to evaluate Rusty over a game of chess.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hunting Human Beings Part 1
programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness Part 1
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific rapists and serial killers in Alaska’s history. For more than a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he shot them like prey, until one woman escaped.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away Part 2
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker serial killer was hiding in plain sight. He presented himself as a soft-spoken family man and was prowling the streets at night, stalking his prey. One woman’s story led police to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away Part 2
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker serial killer was hiding in plain sight. He presented himself as a soft-spoken family man and was prowling the streets at night, stalking his prey. One woman’s story led police to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.desc: It takes more than a powerful Philippine jungle earthquake, territorial monkeys, rainstorms, lack of food and dehydration to take down this Hockey Mom Survivalist!

programme.desc: Matt, Rylie and Ryan battle an alligator to get a challenge-changing source of protein. Scavenger Gary's discovery of an animal carcass leads to a risk/reward standoff with his team. Sarah scores a desperately needed food win.

programme.desc: Mike Rowe shows how an earthquake, a handshake and a ride on a garbage truck made images from space possible.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Tough as a Mother: The Devil's Homestead
programme.desc: Mexico's Devil's Canyon may have met its match when a homesteading mama takes on its triple-digit heat, scarce water and venomous predators.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: The Dirty 7 vs. South Carolina
programme.desc: Team South Carolina head down to Florida to challenge The Dirty 7. With both money and pride on the line, it's a mad scramble to get the trucks ready in time to race. They will have to push their motors to the limit and battle it out in The Pit.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: The Dirty 7 vs. New England
programme.desc: A mega-truck racing crew from Central Florida, the Dirty 7, are challenging teams from all over the country to find the fastest crew. They race team New England in the Pit: a 405 ft track of mud designed to put the trucks to the test for pride and money.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Drop the Gloves
programme.desc: Ryan Martin teams up with the racers from 405 to prepare for a fierce new season set to kick off at Maryland International Raceway. Texas is also on hand to play the same intense game creating fierce competitions and sky-high tensions.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Team Tension
programme.desc: Oklahoma and Texas have teamed up to ensure one of their own takes home the points victory but tensions are at an all-time high. The 405 looks strong and Texas is pulling out all the stops, but games and delays threaten Ryan's ascent back to the top.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Take Back These Streets
programme.desc: After dominating the track, the once-mighty kings of the street return to reclaim their roots. Feeling like drivers have gotten soft, Chief puts the 405 to test with the most important list shakeup ever. Chief and Murder Nova part ways.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The NOLA Threat
programme.desc: As round two begins at New England Dragway, the racers from NOLA prove they mean business. Lizzy, Scott and Kye lead the charge but Teams OKC and Texas won't go down without a fight.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Flukes Allowed
programme.desc: The racers move into round two in St. Louis and newcomer Big Chief is making big moves to show he's a force to be reckoned with. Team NOLA continues to make its presence felt, proving they shouldn't be overlooked.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Outlaws Legacy
programme.desc: Chief, Farmtruck and Azn highlight eight plus years of racing insanity in the 405. Plus: a first look at Sin City Showdown, exclusively on Discovery+.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Outcast Mentality
programme.desc: With three drivers in the top five, NOLA shows no signs of slowing down as racers head into round two in Idaho. Meanwhile, teamwork doesn't come naturally to the newly-formed Team Outcast.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Game On
programme.desc: Team NOLA is seeking revenge as the racers move into the second round at Route 66 Raceway. Ryan is ready to fight to keep his points lead but Disco Dean, Axman and the Outcasts are hot on his trail.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Ruler of the Mountain
programme.desc: Conditions remain unforgiving as the racers move into round two at Colorado's Bandimere Speedway. With so much on the line, even those who are struggling will stop at nothing to win and be crowned King or Queen of the Mountain.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Callout Karma
programme.desc: Round two hits the racers at a time when every decision can either make or break them. Points leader Ryan Martin becomes painfully aware of the consequences of his decisions when it matters most.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: It Ain't Over Yet
programme.desc: Round two of the seventh race begins. Team NOLA's strategy in round one didn't pan out, but they still have a chance to impact the points standings if leaders draw one of their names.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Do or Die
programme.desc: The second round of the season's final race has arrived and all eyes are on Ryan as he attempts bring home the championship after two unsuccessful seasons. Kye and Lizzy are his only competition but they're laser-focused on taking the win for themselves.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: The Grand Strategy
programme.desc: With the first Top 20 list in place and a long night of racing ahead, drivers must apply the rules they learned to formulate strategies, and move up.

programme.desc: Michael finds out about the breast reduction. Jovi's mom criticizes Yara. Kalani's sister is skeptical of Asuelu. Andrei confronts his brother-in-law. Julia worries about her immigration status. Tiffany's mom questions Ronald's commitment.

programme.desc: Christina tries to mend her relationship with Jessica before she drops some big news. Ron puts his plan to get Patrix's mind off Orlando into action. Brittany and Briana struggle to separate from each other on solo dates with their husbands.

programme.desc: Chrissy returns to L.A. just before the shutdown and meets Tayler for the first time. The Merrifields say a tearful goodbye to Bert. The Winders debate if they're ready for Kimberley to visit. The Clarks' relationship with Kaleh is tested in quarantine.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Modern Day Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A surprise announcement sends Erica's brother reeling.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Let's Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Aimee's mom, Rachel, comes to visit, stirring up Erica's insecurities and causing a confrontation with Paige and Dave. As if family drama isn't enough, Erica and Spencer need to have 'the sex talk' with the older kids.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Step Kid Swap
programme.desc: Erica and Spencer have a step-kid swap so each parent can build a better bond with their step-children. Then, the time has come for four of Erica's seven kids to get their annual MRI screening for cancer cells, and Quinn has a bone to pick with Spencer.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Beauty School Drop-In
programme.desc: Theresa reads teenage triplets who suffered a tragic loss. And at a group reading, Theresa channels a man who lost many friends while serving in the military. Then, Victoria shocks the entire family when she announces she's dropping out of school.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Is the Gift Real?
programme.desc: At a group reading, Theresa brings closure to a man who has been tortured by his son's death. Theresa gets a brain scan while she's channeling, in the hopes doctors can tell her what goes on in her head when she's channeling spirit.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: I Now Pronounce You...
programme.desc: Theresa is asked to officiate a wedding for two people who met at one of her group readings, and Larry is asked to be their best man. Before heading to Los Angeles for the ceremony, Theresa surprises a woman on Wall Street with a reading.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Freezing Theresa
programme.desc: 'Shark Tank' shark Barbara Corcoran gets a reading with Theresa. At a fundraiser, Theresa channels an accident victim for the distraught police officer who couldn't save him. Theresa reads a man while she's inside a cryogenic freezing chamber.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Polygamist and Proud!

programme.desc: Tosha makes a bold confession to her mom. Despite their family's concern, the Merrifields forge ahead with their plans for potential sister wife Roberta. Vanessa and Kaleh clash over their differences. The Snowdens' new girlfriend reveals a secret.

programme.desc: The Merrifields head to Mexico to reunite with fiancee Roberta. The plot thickens as the Snowdens reveal a new twist in their world. Rather than search online, the Joneses go out on the town. Life in the Winder home is looking very different these days.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Emotions and Commotions

programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Learn about the ridiculous products the Jokers wanted to pitch and which Joker has the least amount of sales experience. Plus, find out who is Q's alter ego.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: A Car Is Torn
programme.desc: Chris, Wes, and Alex convince Eric to finally trade in his Minivan. Plus, the boys rock some Shock Collar Magic, Wes throws axes, and we introduce The Great Ramsini.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Mom and Pop-Up Magic Shop
programme.desc: The boys help save a local magic shop. Plus, The Great Ramsini hits the barbershop.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Space Oddity
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr offer evocative responses when taste testing new food. Plus, tonight's loser gets sent to a place far, far away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: OK Zoomer
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe help job seekers land their next big gig and pitch their memoirs to a focus group. The losing joker will deliver news heard around the world.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Charlotte McKinney
programme.desc: The chefs recreate Charlotte McKinney's favorite all-natural burger. They'll have to use their imagination no stick the landing.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: James Van Der Beek
programme.desc: 90s heartthrob James Van Der Beek challenges the chefs to create and remix a delectable and iconic Californian burger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker doesn't like camping and what the guys say when they're asked for directions. Plus, learn which Joker has a thing for segways.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal dine and discuss their lives. Find out what's on the menu and whether they'll ever actually cook tenderloin.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Show Me the Funny
programme.desc: Find out what part of the male anatomy you definitely don't want stuck in a bike wheel, see the world's largest whoopee cushion and witness an epic unicycle fail.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Find out why a boy regrets his first kiss.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Top Priority of NASA
programme.desc: Featuring soup fit for space, odd ear wax removal, and a mystic massage. Plus, a trick throws a mover into a time warp when he sees the future and repeats the past.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Drone Care

programme.title: Modern Family: The Late Show
programme.desc: Jay pulls some strings to get reservations at the new restaurant for an adult's night out. But, in each household, everyone is running late -- Gloria, as usual, is taking forever to get ready, and Claire and Phil are concerned about Luke being home alone.

programme.title: Modern Family: ClosetCon '13
programme.desc: With some urging from Claire, Jay begrudgingly agrees to return to ClosetCon this year, and things get interesting when Jay is reunited with some old colleagues.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Man and the Tree
programme.desc: Jay takes Manny out to cut down their own Christmas tree, and Gloria is on edge with mom in town, but changes her tune when she sees her bonding with Claire. Then, Mitchell is forced to do last-minute shopping when they didn't get Lily the right gift.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Feud
programme.desc: Phil is upset to have lost his elected office of social chair to his nemesis Gil Thorpe, and when he finds out Luke is competing against Gil's kid in a wrestling match, it becomes his own personal battle.

programme.title: Modern Family: Other People's Children
programme.desc: It's male-bonding day when Jay takes Luke into the garage to show him the way around tools and impart some manly wisdom, and Gloria goes with Claire and Lily to shop for Lily's flower girl dress.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Long Honeymoon
programme.desc: This summer has been exceptionally blissful in the Dunphy house. Alex is away on a humanitarian trip and the rest of the family is getting along swimmingly, but when Alex comes home, there is an immediate shift in mood.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: After a long reunion weekend with Phil's old cheer buddies, Claire jumps at the chance to snag the only first-class seat left on the return flight home, leaving Phil in coach. Both have completely opposite experiences to what they were expecting.

programme.title: Modern Family: Integrity
programme.desc: Phil and Jay run an errand together to pick up Lily's hand-me-down princess castle for Joe. However, both are in a mood because Phil is upset that Claire won't let him buy a video game console and Jay thinks Gloria is letting Joe play with girlie items.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Verdict
programme.desc: Claire is excited to give Haley and Alex a great experience for 'Bring Your Daughter to Work Day' but the staff is not making it easy. Elsewhere, Phil takes Luke and Manny's class out for community service day.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother!
programme.desc: When Dede drops in unexpectedly, Mitchell and Cam come to a realization about her effect on their lives; Phil, Luke, Alex and Haley all have different bad news to break to Claire and compete about when to do it.

programme.title: Modern Family: Did the Chicken Cross the Road?
programme.desc: When Cam forgets the words to his favourite country song, he blames Mitch and decides he needs to reconnect with his roots and get a chicken. Meanwhile, Alex is up for a prestigious government job that requires a family interview.

programme.title: Modern Family: Kids These Days
programme.desc: Haley needs a little motherly advice from Claire as she considers her future with Dylan and her career. Meanwhile, Jay and Cam’s less than politically correct coaching style earns them a class on sensitivity.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blasts From the Past
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before they become grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mom who has an interesting past.

programme.title: Modern Family: SuperShowerBabyBowl
programme.desc: Jay is hosting a Super Bowl party, and Claire is hosting a baby shower for Haley; both at Jay's house.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Year of Birthdays
programme.desc: As the birth of Haley and Dylan’s twins approaches we take a look back at how each family member celebrated their birthdays this past year.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End of an Era
programme.desc: The family makes a big decision about the future of the show and reflects on how Keeping Up will truly be an end of an era. Kris goes on a girls’ trip to decompress from the decision.

programme.title: Botched: Human Dolls
programme.desc: Plastic surgeons Terry Dubrow and Paul Nassif treat a woman with a uni-boob, an actress who has had six surgeries in search of the perfect nose, and make a house call for Justin, a self-proclaimed human doll.

programme.title: Botched: Janice Dickinson Knows Breast
programme.desc: Janice Dickinson visits the doctors to replace her 30-year-old breast implants. A man goes under the knife to fix his crooked nose. A potential patient brings the crazy during her eye-opening consultation.

programme.title: Botched: Vagina Bomb!
programme.desc: Transgender star Kimber James asks the doctors to fix her botched breasts, nose and vagina. Paul tackles a tragic deviated septum and internet celebrity Renee Talley wants her famous botched bottom fixed.

programme.title: Botched: Like a Surgeon
programme.desc: A reality star seeks help to fix her botched boobs and stomach after her former plastic surgeon is allegedly killed by an unhappy patient. Paul fixes a pig-ish' nose and Terry struts his stuff with a celebrity impersonator.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Freak!
programme.desc: The doctors have their hands full with a personal trainer willing to go to extreme measures to remove a head scar, while a cancer survivor wants her botched reconstructive breasts to look natural again.

programme.title: Botched: Girls Gone Wildd
programme.desc: A woman with uneven breasts seeks Terry's help; an anxious patient stays awake for her tummy tuck; Mega-boob star Lacey Wildd wants to upgrade her implants to QQQ.

programme.title: Botched: Silicone Valley
programme.desc: A transgender pop star needs her pixie ears fixed for a music video shoot; a model with an eye bag problem goes under the knife; Paul puts the finishing touches on a patient who was born with a birth defect.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New York
programme.desc: In the season premiere, reality star Tiffany 'New York' Pollard hopes the doctors can fix her botched boobs. Paul reconstructs a severely burned chin and the doctors meet a transgender woman whose face was pumped with cement.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Unleashed
programme.desc: Savannah returns home for Jackson's third birthday, she brings her a new puppy. This infuriates Todd. Chase attempts to bond with his dad, purely for his own financial gain.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase
programme.desc: When Chase scores an internship at a local television station, he is forced to deal with some difficult talent, Todd Chrisley. And, looking for a new hobby, Faye and Julie learn Italian.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye
programme.desc: Todd discovers that Faye has injured her foot on yet another gambling adventure and insists she recover at his house. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie push a reluctant Grayson to take up a hobby.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moving On
programme.desc: In an effort to cheer up Grayson, Savannah organizes a farewell weekend for Grayson and friends. Meanwhile, Chase teams up with BFF Parker for an unexpected get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: As the Chrisley's settle into their new Nashville home, Todd begins to encroach upon Savannah's independence. Meanwhile, Grayson takes up wrestling and challenges Chase to a match.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Smoothie Operator
programme.desc: The family prepares for the Grand Opening of their newly purchased juice bar, but Chase can't take the job seriously. Back at the house, Faye tries to collect on a bet she made with Grayson.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase in Charge
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head to LA for Julie's liposuction procedure, leaving Chase in charge. But when Chase abuses his newfound authority, Todd must return home early to put a stop to Chase's antics.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Family Food Feud: Part 2
programme.desc: It's a family affair in Flavortown when two restaurant-owning families compete for a chance at a $20,000 shopping spree. Each round, the families must choose one member to compete in a challenge that will earn a key advantage in the next round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Scientists
programme.desc: It's a night of culinary experiments, modern techniques and out-of-this-world plating when Guy Fieri brings four food scientists to Flavortown to showcase their molecular gastronomy skills.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG List Games
programme.desc: Everyone goes grocery shopping with a list, so Guy Fieri has three list-themed games prepared.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Mom Cooks Best
programme.desc: For Mother's Day, Guy Fieri recruits three GGG all-star chef moms for cooking challenges in their own homes. Guy tests their multitasking mastery as he tries to blindside them with games, surprises and unexpected challenges.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Camping and Global Eats
programme.desc: Chefs Anne Burrell and Michael Symon watch as the recruits cook using only camping equipment and utensils. Then former recruits watch and comment on an episode with international food-inspired challenges and mentor Rachael Ray.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: No License to Kill
programme.desc: Foolhardy speedsters run afoul of wardens on a nighttime stakeout mission. Game Warden Mike Boone investigates reckless gunfire endangering life and property, and Game Warden Chelsea Bailey crosses paths with a wanted man during a routine safety check.

programme.desc: Warden Richards confronts a suspected poacher for illegally hunting ducks and geese. Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey monitor an injured deer running along a busy highway, and a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, Wildlife Agents protect the state's resources. A crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer, and Agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wake of Destruction
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mallory Mitchell and Jeremy Lindsey intervene when an overloaded boat and unruly jet skiers put lives at risk. Game Warden Randolph McGee investigates reports of a wild hog being tortured, while other game wardens round up a willy alligator.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wake of Destruction
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mallory Mitchell and Jeremy Lindsey intervene when an overloaded boat and unruly jet skiers put lives at risk. Game Warden Randolph McGee investigates reports of a wild hog being tortured, while other game wardens round up a willy alligator.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for the illusive big horn sheep in the mountains of West Texas. A family near Houston reports shots from a neighboring ranch are raining down on their home. Wardens track down a bow hunter, incriminated by his own game camera.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Busted
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens patrol the southern border for illegal fishing activity and the northern border for a trapper who may be selling live coyotes. Game Wardens go undercover to stop someone suspected of harassing deer hunters.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Super Fluffy Puppies
programme.desc: Three litters of puppies go from cute to cuter during the first few months of their lives.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Spitting Mad
programme.desc: Dorothy and Travis's cat, Polly, vomits out of anger, and attacks the couple.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Steve and the Dragon
programme.desc: Steve Irwin comes face-to-face with the largest living lizard in the world, the Komodo dragon, on the remote islands of Indonesia. These huge powerful reptiles seem lazy and docile, most of the time.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Great Escape
programme.desc: The Sumatran orangutans have been getting used to new quarters, when keepers see that Subis, Tuti, Siska and Indah have gone missing. The keepers must rely on their understanding of the escapees to try to tempt them back inside.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sky High Redwood Retreat
programme.desc: An arborist pushes the team's skills to the limit, requesting a tri-level residence a dizzying 60 feet up in three giant redwood trees. Pete and the crew take the comforts of home to new heights in this bohemian chic treehouse.

programme.title: Tanked!: For Love of the Game… or Money?
programme.desc: The duo must score a touchdown with NFL's Bart Scott and turn his ponds into Club Aqua.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Can't Give Up

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Collision Course
programme.desc: A dangerous rescue mission is launched to secure two dogs spotted running wild on the train tracks next to the rescue center.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator Bait
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens search for an alligator that bit a man and his 13-year old son. In West Texas, an abandoned car leads the Wardens to believe a teenage girl may be missing. A man is suspected of hunting on his neighbor's property without permission.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Buffalo Trail
programme.desc: The wolf pack seizes an opportunity to stockpile meat with their first ever buffalo hunt. Brothers Noah and Bam are left to build a mine-cooled meat locker and keep the ranch running in anticipation of the family's return.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House 2

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Poker Night
programme.desc: It's a high stakes proposition when a man saddles up to the shop with a 19th century professional gambling set.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: Hats off to the Pawn Stars, when a man brings in a signed print of Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pony Up
programme.desc: A collection from former Attorney General J. Howard McGrath enters the shop complete with his Secret Service I.D. and some counterfeit money. Rick and Chumlee encounter a 1960s U. S. Marines vehicle called a "Mighty Mite."

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cash Is King
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get the royal treatment when autographed memoirs from English nobility parade into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Break Room Battle
programme.desc: Get the show on the road with the Pawn Stars when an antique circus calliope whistles into the shop. Then, Rick rallies for a letter signed by JFK about the 1963 March on Washington.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Road Test
programme.desc: A guitar that belonged to The Who's bassist strikes a chord with Rick. Then, Rick and Lili get the presidential treatment when a customer brings in a Richard Nixon paper dress. The guys decide it's time to put the Old Man's driving skills to the test.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Off to the Races
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars strike silver when the book 'The Big Bonanza' arrives at the shop. Rick moves mountains for an ancient Tibetan door. Corey gets a ticket, which leads to a competition to find out who is the better driver.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hiding Houdini
programme.desc: Get spellbound with the Pawn Stars when a book written and signed by legendary magician Harry Houdini appears in the shop. Then, Corey and Chum are in for a shock when they spot a vintage X-ray unit. Later, Chumlee takes a vow of silence.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Clowning Around
programme.desc: A Gene Autry guitar and a portrait of Red Skelton arrive at the shop. Then, Chum decides to sell his shoe collection at the shop while Rick has different thoughts on the subject.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spider Pawn
programme.desc: Rick looks into the authenticity of a rare 1936 Zippo prototype. Corey's wants to snag an antique rotary phone for the right price. Chumlee meets Marvel Comics creator and legendary writer Stan Lee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawnshine State
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee travel to the Sunshine State to look at a fully loaded 1954 Rybovich Yacht. Rick visits another pawn shop while in Florida, owned by his friend Lisa. Meanwhile in Vegas, Corey's quite busy with a huge Incredible Hulk comic collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mini Miles
programme.desc: Rick and Marie Osmond come across what could potentially be one of the first ever Barbie dolls. Chumlee takes a ride in a tiny amusement park car, while Corey tries to make a deal. A rare 'Citizen Kane' production still may be worth a buy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Great Scott!
programme.desc: Rick receives an offer on a 1973 Marshall amp, with all of the original parts intact. A hoverboard signed by the cast of the 'Back to the Future' sequel floats into the shop towards Corey and Chumlee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Business Is Brewing
programme.desc: Rick examines some antique beer memorabilia at the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop. He also takes a trip to a pal's brewery in San Diego to get a history lesson on tap. The guys locate an original McCormick Farmall tractor with a hefty price point.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Greatest Pawn on Earth!
programme.desc: An early edition of P.T. Barnum's autobiography has Rick willing to perhaps pay more for the book than it's worth. Curiousity is peaked when Rick is faced with a rare 1966 Doge Charger, complete with a Hemi engine. A Napoleonic era sword fascinates Chum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: By Land or By Seep
programme.desc: Rick thinks about taking a big risk and removing six Picasso etchings from a renowned illustrated edition of 'Lysistrata.' Chumlee checks out some vintage ThunderCats toys from the 1980s. Rick and Corey debate about bringing an amphibious jeep off land.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Crown Pawn
programme.desc: Corey bets it all on an original Triple Crown Trophy; let's see if he can win this horse race. Next the guys call in Rick Dale to save what might be one of the very first rides from Coney Island.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn to the Rescue
programme.desc: Rick is in search of his own personal fire truck. Then, Chumlee chases an antique from one of the very first underground transportation systems, and Corey and Rick pursue an exclusive item that belonged to Hunter S. Thompson.

programme.desc: When a freak lightning storm puts the entire town on lockdown, the kids are disappointed that they are not able to go to the movie theater to see a highly anticipated zombie movie.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Blair Bennett: Child Activist
programme.desc: When Frank Morris Middle starts serving new unpalatable lunches, Blair sees an opportunity to skip class by becoming a 'student activist.'

programme.title: Jessie: Trashin' Fashion
programme.desc: Emma is excited that her mom is planning a fashion show to showcase her new teen fashion line. Once Emma sees the terrible designs, she becomes conflicted about whether she should give honest reviews on her fashion blog.

programme.title: Jessie: 101 Lizards
programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie
programme.desc: Jessie is concerned that Tony has become controlling, clingy and insecure in their relationship. After Tony invites her out for a 'very special night' to meet his parents, she is terrified that he is going to propose.

programme.title: Jessie: Say Yes to the Messy Dress
programme.desc: When NBA player Chris Bosh needs somewhere to stay, Jessie volunteers the penthouse.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Jessie: Zuri's New Old Friend
programme.desc: Jessie wants Zuri to play with real friends instead of imaginary ones, but when Zuri befriends the much older Nana Bananas who wears yellow track suits, talks to herself in the park and constantly squeaks a yellow horn, Jessie is worried.

programme.title: Jessie: World Wide Web of Lies
programme.desc: Jessie is bullied by a bossy nanny named Agatha at the park and ends up on her Stroller Patroller, (a website that features pictures of nannies appearing to abuse their children).

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Meatball-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Willow helps Maddie send in a video application for a basketball scholarship. When Willow gets notified that she has received a scholarship and Maddie hasn't heard yet, Maddie gets jealous and blows up at Willow.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Ask-Her-More-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv gets upset when an interview focuses on her appearance instead of her acting. She enlists her friend Kristen Bell to help her change the conversation.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Soups & Stars
programme.desc: Trish's new boss at Miss Suzy's Soups is also Ally's former elementary school teacher. When Ally inadvertently plays a prank on her, Miss Suzy's business stars to suffer. Ally feels terrible, so she and the gang come up with a plan to get customers back.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Diners and Daters
programme.desc: Trish gets a job at a diner, the gang goes for lunch and Austin instantly falls for one of the waitresses. She tells him she doesn't have time to date, so Austin gets a job at the diner to win her over. Dez continues trying to fend off Mindy's attention.

programme.title: Jessie: Cattle Calls and Scary Walls
programme.desc: Jessie auditions for a role in a television series and is convinced that she can talk her way into getting the part. However, it's Zuri who impresses the director. Emma, who Jessie left in charge at home, joins Ravi and Luke to look for rats in the walls.

programme.title: Jessie: Green-Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: Jessie joins a comedy improv class, and Tony goes to embarrassing lengths to prove his love for Jessie. Meanwhile, Ravi recruits Zuri to help him babysit Mrs. Kipling's baby lizards.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Catalyst (Heroes' Day, Part 1)

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Mayura (Heroes' Day, Part 2)

programme.title: Sofia the First: Baileywhoops
programme.desc: When a new castle steward puts a curse on Baileywick in an attempt to take over his job, Sofia and Minimus must figure out a plan to get Baileywick back.

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Leafsong Festival
programme.desc: Crackle wants to sing in the Leafsong Festival but her animal friends won't let her for fear she'll scorch everything.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad. Two babysitters turn up to look after Bluey and Bingo!

programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.desc: In order to delivery baby Maya, a treasure hunt ensues! Pip and Freddy accidentally let a baby orangutan escape from his crate, and must climb after him.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Mustang

programme.title: Dateline: Angels and Demons
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious deaths inside a traveling commune and an investigation that spans 10 years. Two sisters and former commune members come forward for the first time to share their stories involving a diabolical world of lies, lust, and greed.

programme.title: Dateline: Angels and Demons
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious deaths inside a traveling commune and an investigation that spans 10 years. Two sisters and former commune members come forward for the first time to share their stories involving a diabolical world of lies, lust, and greed.

programme.title: NCIS: SWAK

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Chinatown
programme.desc: The death of a lieutenant commander appears to be suicide but the NCIS team uncovers evidence corresponding to murder. Also, Operational Psychologist Nate Getz joins Special Agent Kensi Blye in the field.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Full Throttle

programme.title: NCIS: Twilight

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Ari, Part II

programme.title: NCIS: Mind Games
programme.desc: Gibbs is ordered to meet with a convicted serial killer who has a vendetta against him.

programme.title: NCIS: Silver War
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team are called in when a deceased man is found encased in a Civil War tomb.

programme.title: NCIS: Switch

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: The Torture Escape
programme.desc: No one knows how Harry Houdini pulled off his death-defying escapes, but now, a team of experts investigate his water torture illusion to reveal the secrets of this mysterious feat. What they uncover suggests Houdini might have led a double life as a spy.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: To Catch a Bullet
programme.desc: A team of experts re-create one of the deadliest tricks in magic history to uncover how Houdini could have pulled off the feat that killed many of his peers.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: Siberian Prison Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of Houdini's greatest escapes might have been a deep-cover conspiracy to spy for the American government and experts recreate his break from a Siberian prison transport to investigate the mysteries behind this incredible feat.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Houdini's mysterious sudden death might not have been an accident, and experts recreate his buried alive escape to reveal how this deadly feat was performed and if the great magician was killed by forces far more insidious.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Tech We Love to Hate
programme.desc: Kari, Tory and Grant brave the world of irritating gadgets, from poorly timed traffic lights to things that go beep in the night.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
