programme.desc: A teenage lifeguard vanishes from a quiet community swimming hole less than three minutes after her mother dropped her off for work.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Lived A Double Life
programme.desc: Sonja Holt begins to suspect that her fiancé, Stafford Shaw, is living a secret double life. She can't imagine just how far he will go to keep everyone from finding out the truth about him or the terrible price that will be paid when his secrets collide.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Follow That Car
programme.desc: When a loving father is found murdered execution-style in his own home, investigators must follow the trail of his missing car to find his cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Terror in Bedford Park
programme.desc: A young woman is found stabbed to death locked inside a locker at a storage facility.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: 20-year old Justin Newman lands a great job in construction, but when he disappears on the day his new boss is found brutally murdered, a nation-wide search for Justin uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Deadly Drive
programme.desc: The investigation into 26-year-old Kim Medlin's mysterious disappearance reveals secrets that shatter the safety and security of everyone in the tight-knit town of Monroe, North Carolina.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Burning Secrets
programme.desc: When an 80-year-old woman is murdered after leaving to running errands, Flint, Michigan investigators discover her case is tied to an unsolved drive-by shooting. Police must use science and skillful interrogation to catch a remorseless killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Body on Bowden Road
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Stephanie Shea Graham is found murdered on a desolate road, detectives gather clues and question all those closest to her. When the truth is finally revealed, the identity of her killer will prove to be more shocking than ever imagined.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Monsters Among Friends
programme.desc: A popular high school cheerleader from a rural Oklahoma town slips out her bedroom window after having a few angry words with her mother. She is never seen alive again.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Terror Under the Moonlight
programme.desc: An unthinkable murder and miraculous story of survival take shape in a small Gulf Coast Texas town. A quiet night out between teenaged friends turns into every parent's nightmare when a killer stumbles upon his unsuspecting prey.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Last Face She Saw
programme.desc: When the most popular pizza restaurant of little Claypool Hill, VA is turned into a horrific crime scene, everybody is stunned. With clues revealing more than robbery, law enforcement know they must move fast to catch the killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Liaisons
programme.desc: She was a small town girl from rural Wisconsin. He was a Chicago superstar, a hometown hero with the legendary Bears. Together, they were expecting their first child. But no one was expecting their tale to end in the deadly way it did.

programme.title: Dateline: The Informant
programme.desc: A young woman’s chilling story about a girl’s abduction and murder helps re-open a case that has haunted a New York town for decades.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: No Body No Crime
programme.desc: Detective Postiglione is investigating a crime scene with a unique challenge: there is no victim. Pools of blood indicate something terrible occurred, but the young woman is nowhere to be found. It's up to Pat to find her and a possible murderer.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Unholy Ghost
programme.desc: Church parishioners call 911 when they find their priest unconscious, after he fails to show up for Mass who has been stabbed to death. Police uncover an earlier call made by the victim himself, and track a missing cell phone to a find deranged killer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood 4 H Camp
programme.desc: The crew visits the oldest statewide 4H Camp in the country and teach a team of teenagers how to build a log cabin. Mark and Sherman compete as archery coaches and Johnny learns the pioneer craft of paper marbling.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: In Merrie's Memory
programme.desc: Joe and Merrie Colvard dreamed of having an antique log cabin. But only a few weeks after they picked one out on the Boneyard, tragedy struck and Merrie unexpectedly passed away. Joe is determined to build the cabin in his late wife's honour.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Deep Creek Dreaming
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Maryland. Their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people. However, finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Family Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family. They find a charmer with plenty of space for up to 30 people, but their DIY reno reveals unexpected issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories on Lake Martin
programme.desc: A blended family of eight finds a vacation home on Lake Martin, Alabama, but the property needs major renovations. He's a contractor and is ready to get to work with a tight budget and a long to-do list to help the family realize their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Scone With the Wind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits one of America's top ten largest state fairs to sample the swamp burger, redneck sushi and the chicken 'n' waffles bowl.

programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The squad must work quickly to track down a serial killer before he strikes again. Meanwhile, things get dangerous over a game of chess.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hunting Human Beings Part 1
programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness Part 1
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific rapists and serial killers in Alaska’s history. For more than a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he shot them like prey, until one woman escaped.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away Part 2
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker serial killer was hiding in plain sight. He presented himself as a soft-spoken family man and was prowling the streets at night, stalking his prey. One woman’s story led police to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit

programme.title: Botched: Boob-Watch
programme.desc: Former 'Baywatch' star Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after her last surgeon gave her implants that were too big. Terry tries to reconstruct a woman with flesh eating disease.

programme.title: Botched: The Bacon Bra
programme.desc: The doctors help a female bodybuilder who wants to look more feminine, Paul performs surgery on a woman who has large nostril anxiety, and Katella Dash will do anything to look like a human blow-up doll.

programme.title: Botched: Four Leeches and a Funeral
programme.desc: Reality star Dwight Eubanks says farewell to his nose with a funeral, a woman's boob job has left her with a suspicious bubble on her breast, and a busty performer gives the doctors a smashing show they'll never forget.

programme.title: Botched: Mo' Steroids Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Terry helps Mo Thugs rapper Guillermo 'Big Caz' Eiland and his case of 'Man Boobs,' former Model Jana Stoner who got breast implants in her butt after a Mexico surgery gone bad and a UK man with super-sized lips sees the doctors about his leaking filler.

programme.title: Botched: Dolly'd Up
programme.desc: A celebrity impersonator wants to fix her saggy skin, Paul helps a woman with a potentially unfixable nose, and Daniella 'two spirits' Mendez wants a convertible implant for both a male and female option.

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The doctors help a woman whose nose was botched by the 'House of Horrors.' Also, Tanya hopes to remove a scar that reminds her of her unborn twin and the infamous Sarah Burge visits the doctors to find eternal youth.

programme.title: Botched: Knuckles and Knockers
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow tries to separate a uniboob and Dr. Nassif fights to fix a former boxer’s nose. Plus, the Doctors deliver some unexpected news to actress and model Shauna Sand.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Botched: Attack of the 3,000cc Implants
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow takes on the biggest breast case of his career, Dr. Nassif tackles a soldier's botched nose and the doctors meet a man whose life goal is to look like a super hero.

programme.title: Botched: Say Yes to the Breasts
programme.desc: Former actress Heather fought a flesh-eating disease that left her with no breasts. Dr. Dubrow helps a spiritual woman who has a butt on her belly and Dr. Nassif helps a man whose doctor left a thumbprint on his nose.

programme.title: Botched: The Serial Filler
programme.desc: Farrah Abraham visits the doctors about her blown up lips, a friend of Dr. Dubrow's seeks help for his botched stomach and Jessa hopes the doctors can help erase the physical reminders left from a fatal car accident.

programme.title: Botched: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Paul follows a hunch and orders more tests for a woman with a severely botched nose and discovers shocking news. The doctors work in tandem to get two 'botched bunnies' back in centerfold shape.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Give Me Some Mo!
programme.desc: The kitchen is more fun when Sunny Anderson and "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee decide who will take on Bobby Flay. Puerto Rican chef Andre Gomez and Dominican chef Ramon Perez duke it out in the kitchen for their shot at the master.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fry Me a River
programme.desc: Chopped judges Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian have yet to take down the king. They return to the arena for redemption and to get the job done, they've brought in Nevada's Robert Hesse to battle New York's Michael Jenkins.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Marital Match
programme.desc: Husband and wife Cody and Sam Carroll of Cajun Aces compete to prove that love is a kitchen battlefield. It's only fitting that "The Kitchen's" dynamic duo, Sunny Anderson and Jeff Mauro, officiate the attempt to send Bobby Flay off unhappily ever after.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Revenge Is Best Served Bold
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's former co-worker Leia Gaccione and Asian expert Tony Nguyen are back for more, returning to the arena for a second chance to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Perched for Victory
programme.desc: "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell gets a little help from her friend Valerie Bertinelli on the mission to bring down Bobby Flay. They recruit Napa Valley's Elizabeth Binder and Washington, D.C.'s Mike Ellis to help them.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Only in New York
programme.desc: Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Symon join forces to take down their fellow Iron Chef, Bobby Flay. Tensions rise as Daniel Holzmon dukes it out with Palak Patel.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli and Geoffrey Zakarian have brought in two talented pastry chefs, Erica Land and Jacqueline Joy Dino, to sprinkle the kitchen with sugar and spice and a loss for Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Mic
programme.desc: Chopped's Amanda Freitag and comedian Jo Koy show up to boo Bobby Flay out of his kitchen. They invite Washington, D.C.'s Ryan Hackney and Nora Haron from the California Bay Area to bring their kitchen skills to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: The Mid-Atlantic
programme.desc: The nine bakers' master challenge has a Mid-Atlantic theme: making their own upscale version of Maryland's Smith Island cake and incorporating boardwalk popcorn. The bake-off round involves a dessert inspired by the Pennsylvania classic shoofly pie.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Bake the Bizarre!
programme.desc: The competing chefs face an odd traditional Japanese sweet and a very large egg in the first basket. In the second basket, a weird ice cream is a treat compared to a certain animal's feet.

programme.desc: All in good fun, the baskets are packed with ingredients that might appeal to the basic male human. Sharpshooter cupcakes and a meaty snack are part of the riddle in round one, and beer brownies get enthusiastic support from the finalists in round three.

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: Renovation Island: When It Rains, It Pours

programme.title: Renovation Island: Power Struggle

programme.title: Renovation Island: Out of Gas

programme.title: Renovation Island: Bottoms Up

programme.title: Renovation Island: This Build Is a Beach

programme.desc: Go inside the 200-year-old university to uncover the complex selection process, secret rituals and traditions and special training that each cadet experiences at the renowned institution of military might.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Mystery of Bigfoot
programme.desc: New light is shed on some of the nation's darkest Sasquatch secrets. Recent discoveries of previously unknown hominids and breakthroughs in genetic technology have given a nation of Bigfoot believers new hope that this creature will be found.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Mafia
programme.desc: For decades, the criminal organization known as 'The Mafia' has stained the fabric of American society. Uncover the secret world of organized crime and the violent tactics used by Cosa Nostra to gain money and power.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Hells Angels
programme.desc: No club in America is more secretive than the Hells Angels. Get the real story about the Hells Angels from all sides - from motorcycle world insiders to club infiltrators to law enforcement officials.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: There are an estimated 5,000 cults operating in the U.S. The psychological allure of cults, their charismatic leaders and insidious methods of controlling their members are uncovered and a Jonestown survivor remembers the last day of Peoples Temple.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Secret Underground
programme.desc: Take a look at the tunnels, cities and fortresses covertly constructed beneath the feet of the American public, including Mt. Weather, an underground bunker used to house high-ranking officials and secret underground rail systems.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Ancient Astronaut Cover-Up
programme.desc: Theorists, astronauts, journalists, scientists and government officials discuss the possibility of aliens having been to Earth for centuries.

programme.title: Movie: Three Little Words
programme.desc: A frustrated magician and a wannabe baseball player become a popular songwriting team.

programme.title: Movie: The Belle of New York

programme.title: Movie: Waterloo Bridge

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lou's Still the Boss but Now There's a Ross

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Enigmas of Area 51
programme.desc: Satellites capture two strange patterns in the desert, and they are right next to Area 51.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of the Island Eater
programme.desc: Satellites capture evidence of a mysterious structure in a remote and rocky area of Hawaii, and when experts investigate, what they find could point to human sacrifices and the wrath of a shape-shifting god.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Vampires
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal a long-lost village buried in a dense forest; archaeologists investigate and uncover a mysterious gravesite with the remains of decapitated skeletons and possible evidence of vampire burials.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A family's search for new beginnings backfires when their move from Hawaii to Alaska creates an environment perfect for murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Why Did She Leave?

programme.title: Cold Blooded Medicine
programme.desc: Newlyweds Lauran and Matthew Phelps are a made-for-social-media couple: geeky, young, attractive and fun. This image is shattered by a panicked midnight call to 911 to report a gruesome death.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lonesome Cowboy
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in a backyard, police have little to go on. The homeowner has recently disappeared, and all that he has left behind are clues posted online. Police wonder if they will lead to the identity of the victim, or the killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: In 2001, actor Robert Blake finds his new wife, Bonny Lee Bakely, shot in the head in the couple's car. The largest homicide investigation in LAPD history uncovers a story of blind ambition and betrayal.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Little Girl Gone
programme.desc: In June 2003 a five-year-old girl walks around the corner to her friend's house and vanishes into thin air. As police investigate they realize this quaint Midwest community is hiding some disturbing secrets that may never be fully uncovered.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lonesome Cowboy
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in a backyard, police have little to go on. The homeowner has recently disappeared, and all that he has left behind are clues posted online. Police wonder if they will lead to the identity of the victim, or the killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Children of Thunder
programme.desc: In the summer of 2000, panic overwhelms the Bay Area when bags full of body parts start appearing all over the region. Investigators follow the trail of grisly clues and it leads to the discovery of a secret cult carrying out a sinister scheme.

programme.desc: Newlyweds Lauran and Matthew Phelps are a made-for-social-media couple: geeky, young, attractive and fun. This image is shattered by a panicked midnight call to 911 to report a gruesome death.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mother and Child

programme.title: Disappeared: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: Deanne Hastings, a 35-year-old Spokane mom, leaves a note that she's running to the store, but she never returns. As detectives uncover more information about Deanne's actions leading up to her disappearance, a slew of troubling theories emerge.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: A top real estate agent in Little Rock, Arkansas fails to return home after showing a house to a client.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Wicked Witness
programme.desc: What begins as a frantic 911 call to help an assaulted neighbor ends in the most bizarre investigation the small town of Walsenburg, Colorado has ever seen - complete with a twisted tale of torture, family secrets, and a fallen Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Clown Did It
programme.desc: Nearly three decades after a woman was shot in her Palm Beach County, Fla., home by someone wearing a clown costume, two people who were there describe what they saw in this interview.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: The Long Night
programme.desc: When Charlotte, NC Detective Garry McFadden agrees to do a favor for a witness in one of his cases, he finds himself involved in a strange murder investigation that plays out over one of the longest nights of his career, leading to an unexpected killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Check List

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lady in Red

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Good Eats: Et Tu Mame
programme.desc: That culinary chameleon the soybean turns up as edamame when host Alton Brown takes it from the sushi bar and into the kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: Live and Let Diet
programme.desc: Alton discusses how the four food groups helped him lose 50 lbs without dieting.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raising the Bar Again
programme.desc: Alton deconstructs cocktails and rebuilds them with Good Eats style.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Palm Springs
programme.desc: Andrew spotlights the desert oasis of Palm Springs, CA. The sunny resort city features new and iconic spots serving up eats like grilled rib eye and bone marrow butter, the popular reuben stacker and the classic date milkshake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine, such as shrimp, scallops and haddock stuffed in a baked lobster and loaded into a chowder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Detroit
programme.desc: Andrew heads to the Motor City to grab a slice of Detroit-style pizza, line up for a Coney Island dog and chili fries, fill up on timeless Middle Eastern classics and dine at a Detroit institution in the making.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Orlando
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Orlando, Florida, to discover the incredible rich food scene that's often left in the shadow of Disney World.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Krakow
programme.desc: From peasant food to royal snacks, Andrew reveals what makes the food scene in Krakow, Poland, so delicious. The city's edible symbols take the form of pierogis, hearty stuffed cabbage rolls and whole-roasted pork knuckle.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Harlem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Harlem, a vibrant New York City neighborhood with a diverse cross-section of cultures. He highlights its colorful restaurants offering soul food, Caribbean classics, and even the national dish of Senegal.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pub Grub

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Don't Even Blink/ Chez Platypus
programme.desc: A determined Candace decides to find out where her brothers creations disappear to, and Phineas and Ferb open a platypus themed restaurant.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Yeet Eater
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Beginner's Luck
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: La Candace-Cabra/ Happy Birthday, Isabella
programme.desc: The boys set out to prove the existence of the elusive Chupacabra to the world. Phineas and the gang celebrate Isabella’s birthday in a big way, but all she really wants is some quiet time with Phineas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story
programme.desc: Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter named Liam set out on destroying him. He must find a way to defeat this foe, rescue Doofenshmirtz from the error of his ways and save himself.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: La Candace-Cabra/ Happy Birthday, Isabella
programme.desc: The boys set out to prove the existence of the elusive Chupacabra to the world. Phineas and the gang celebrate Isabella’s birthday in a big way, but all she really wants is some quiet time with Phineas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Rise to Victory! Triumph Dragon!
Phineas and Ferb: Unfair Science Fair / Unfair Science Fair Redux
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Stealth Strike
programme.desc: A new Imperial ship captures Ezra, Commander Sato, and his crew, forcing Kanan and the clone to go undercover as stormtroopers to free the rebels.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: The Future of the Force
programme.desc: The rebels learn that the Inquisitors are seeking out Force-sensitive children, and they work together to protect the young ones from the Inquisitors' pursuit.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Pay Me in Full/ Vegan Blues
programme.desc: Unauthorized docking of cheques to repay loan; dispute over details of performance.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Autry vs. Martin
programme.desc: A Texas woman tried and failed to stop her son's wedding, and now she's in court to prove that he is not the father of his wife's two-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Kingsbury vs. James
programme.desc: An Alabama man planned a pregnancy with his girlfriend, but suspicions of cheating and the child's illness now have him questioning paternity of her 11-month-old son.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Kenneth is suing his friend Michael that he met in jail for an unfinished car repair job. Michael says the COVID restrictions resulted in the materials he needed to fix the car not arriving in a timely fashion.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Plaintiff petitions the court for paternity tests to find out if he is the father of two children, a woman wants proof her deceased son is the father of the defendant's daughter, and a woman wants to see if she shares the same father with the defendant.

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Son Was Shot 16 Times, Is That His Baby?
programme.desc: Zakkee served his time and after a few months of freedom, he was shot 16 times while sitting in his car. Not only did he leave behind his mother, Tamara, but also his pregnant girlfriend Jasmine. But Tamara has doubts about the paternity of the child.

programme.title: Maury: You Have 17 Adult Children ... DNA Will Prove it Today!
programme.desc: Keisha has always wanted to know who her biological father is, so she and her mother Glenda are here to test Harold, who denies the claims. Then, Joseph has 16 adult children, and Tykevia is here to see if she is number 17.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Viewers vs. Past Guests
programme.desc: Roger wants Aiden to make up her mind about transitioning. Gucci wants to confront former guest Anamarie over Anamarie hooking up with her boyfriend's good friend. Mya confronts viewer Lilith who thinks Mya's a disgrace to the LGBT community.

programme.title: Maury: I Need 2 More DNA Tests ... All These Kids Can't Be Mine!
programme.desc: Ladaisha and Omar are back as Omar is denying her two children, an his sister Tequila has come to his defense. Michael wants to prove Rogers is his father, but Roger says he can't have kids and that Michael's moms was with over ten different men.
